# 2202 Labs

2202 Labs is my engineering workspace for Splunk, SIEM, automation, and operational tooling. It brings together selected portfolio work, structured case studies, and practical experiments focused on improving reliability, supportability, and workflow efficiency in real operational environments.

## Focus Areas

- Splunk and SIEM engineering
- Security logging and governance
- Workflow automation and internal tooling
- Platform operations and support-focused design
- Case studies grounded in day-to-day engineering work

## Start Here

- **Portfolio Website**  
  https://2202labs.github.io/

- **Featured Work**
  - Splunk Utility Tool 4.0
  - Operational Approach to Log Onboarding and Governance
  - Timesheet Workflow Automation

## What This Organization Is For

This organization is used to publish and organize work related to:

- operational tooling for Splunk-related workflows
- structured approaches to log onboarding and review
- workflow redesign based on real operational pain points
- portfolio materials that support my engineering profile

The emphasis is on practical engineering value rather than repository volume. Some projects are implementation-focused, while others are documentation-led case studies that reflect how I approach design, supportability, and operational improvement.
